name: Rebuilding Oath Courts
summary: Public oath forums where rebuilding obligations, restitution, and civic renewal promises are witnessed and judged.
motive: Turn destruction into accountable renewal instead of endless vengeance or neglect.
power_relations: Backed by House authority and civic ritual, but morally constrained by public memory
visible_membership_base: Oath keepers, witnesses, claimants, matriarchal judges.
current_tension_or_vulnerability: When damage is widespread, the courts can become clogged and start looking symbolic rather than restorative.
